HEARING RE: PETITIONER MORGAN HILL's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions.

Parties stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for parties (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Morgan Hill's motion for order establishing admissions granted to the following extent and otherwise denied. Respondent State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company's objections except as to privilege are stricken. Respondent shall provide further responses to plaintiff's requests for admission, set one, within 20 days of the date of order hereon. Any claims of privilege shall be supported by an adequate privilege log. Respondent shall pay a monetary sanction in the amount of $960.00 to Plaintiff Hill within twenty days of the date of order hereon.

Counsel for petitioner to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at jameshfleming@gmail.com.
